title: FAMILY LAW MEDIATION - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY RESOLUTION SERVICES FAMILY LAW MEDIATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides family law mediation for issues such as divorce, separation, custody, child support, spousal support, and finance and property division. Also offers a general family law clinic. Confidential Address Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Office hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5:30pm. Closed on holidays. Classes: Tuesday 9:30am-1pm, Wednesday 5:30pm-9pm Email (503) 655-8415 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-8415 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: New clients with a pending family law court case are allowed two no-charge mediation sessions (1.5 hours each). Additional sessions are $125 per hour and $187.50 for 1.5-hour joint sessions. Fee waivers must be requested when filing with the court. Cash, check, and credit cards accepted. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Comprehensive Family Law Services Mediation * Divorce/Custody/Support Issues Relationship Workshops Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION PROGRAM LEGAL ASSISTANCE MODALITIES - COMMUNITY DISPUTE RESOLUTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY RESOLUTION SERVICES
